description: ClickHouse is a column-oriented database system for real-time analytics, available as open-source software and as the managed ClickHouse Cloud service. It is used to store and query analytical workloads, and also offers managed cloud administration features and AI-oriented tooling such as an MCP server.
summary: ClickHouse exposes a ClickHouse Cloud REST API, a database HTTP interface, an official MCP server implementation, and the `clickhousectl` CLI; Cloud API auth is documented, while the DB HTTP interface and CLI auth are only partially documented in the pages reviewed.
